replics: Aglaya: Can you arrange for us to meet and make peace with Daria?
Artem: Of course, but I need something related to your friendship.

Aglaya: Look, I made a bow tie for her for her birthday, but I didn't have time to give it to her. I made its color as light as a cherry blossom petal. I want to give it to her personally, as a sign of reconciliation.
